title: Tick Control in Astoria, Queens | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Astoria, Queens starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed experts. Same-day service available.
intro: Astoria's tree-lined streets, proximity to parks like Astoria Park and Welling Court, and abundant green spaces create ideal habitats for ticks. Our professional tick control services protect Astoria homes and families from deer ticks, dog ticks, and the diseases they carry. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick treatment solutions tailored to Queens' urban outdoor environments.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Astoria homeowners for years with specialized tick control treatments that address the unique challenges of Queens neighborhoods. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks from yards, gardens, and outdoor living spaces throughout Astoria.
localContext: Astoria's mix of single-family homes with yards, proximity to the East River waterfront, and neighborhood parks makes tick prevention essential for residents. From the garden areas near Ditmars Boulevard to properties backing onto Astoria Park, our team understands the specific tick pressure points in this diverse Queens community.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Astoria?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Astoria typically range from $125 to $325, depending on property size and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and customized quotes for all Astoria properties, with seasonal treatment packages available for ongoing protection.

faqs.question: What types of ticks are common in Astoria, Queens?
faqs.answer: Astoria residents commonly encounter blacklegged deer ticks (which carry Lyme disease), American dog ticks, and occasionally lone star ticks. Our treatments target all tick species found in the Queens area, focusing on shaded areas, tall grass, and transition zones between lawns and wooded areas.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Astoria?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in Astoria from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be present year-round during mild winters. We recommend starting preventive treatments in early spring and maintaining protection through fall for maximum effectiveness.

faqs.question: Is tick control treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are specifically chosen for their safety profile around children and pets. After treatment, we recommend keeping kids and pets off treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry. Once dry, the treated areas are completely safe for normal family activities in your Astoria yard.
